title: HushSpec Detection Extension v0
description: Schema for the HushSpec Detection extension. Declares thresholds and configuration for content analysis guards.

Level.description: Detection severity level, ordered: safe < suspicious < high < critical.

enabled.description: Whether prompt injection detection is active.

warn_at_or_above.description: Minimum detection level that produces a warning.

block_at_or_above.description: Minimum detection level that produces a denial.

max_scan_bytes.description: Maximum input size to scan, in bytes.

block_threshold.description: Risk score (0-100) at or above which input is denied.

warn_threshold.description: Risk score (0-100) at or above which a warning is produced.

max_input_bytes.description: Maximum input size to scan, in bytes.

enabled.description: Whether threat intelligence screening is active.

pattern_db.description: Path to pattern database file or "builtin:<name>" for engine-bundled databases.

similarity_threshold.description: Minimum similarity score (0.0-1.0) for a pattern match to be considered a finding.

top_k.description: Number of top matches to include in evaluation evidence.
